body: 新發現競品：IntraBio levacetylleucine（N-acetyl-L-leucine）之 CACNA1A 相關疾病 Ph3 樞紐試驗 IB1001-304（NCT07221292）已於 2026/05 獲美/英/歐盟/瑞士監管放行，12 個跨國站點啟動中，估 2026/09 開始收案、n≈60，主要指標為 SARA。
note: → 適應症明列 SCA6，與本社日本承認申請（SCA3/6）之 SCA6 部分正面重疊；惟其為口服症狀改善型小分子（同成分 Aqneursa 已於 NPC 上市），與細胞治療的疾病修飾定位不同。

en.body: Newly identified competitor: IntraBio's levacetylleucine (N-acetyl-L-leucine) pivotal Ph3 trial in CACNA1A-related disorders, IB1001-304 (NCT07221292), received regulatory authorisation to proceed in the US, UK, EU and Switzerland in 2026/05; 12 multinational sites are activating, enrolment estimated to start 2026/09 with n≈60 and SARA as the primary endpoint.
en.note: → The listed indications explicitly include SCA6, overlapping the SCA6 half of our Japanese marketing application (SCA3/6). It is, however, an oral symptomatic small molecule (the same molecule is already marketed as Aqneursa in NPC), positioned differently from disease-modifying cell therapy.

body: 本社 Stemchymal：6/24 產品「承認申請」(SCA3/6) 送 PMDA；6/18 MAH「業許可」送神奈川縣。

en.body: Our Stemchymal: marketing approval application (SCA3/6) filed with PMDA on 6/24; MAH business licence filed with Kanagawa Prefecture on 6/18.

body: 美國二期試驗細節公布：UCLA＋USF 兩站點、預計 2026/09 首例收案，收案 20 人（SCA3），共同主持人 Susan Perlman、Theresa Zesiewicz 醫師；採真實世界數據並事先與 FDA 協議統計分析計畫（SAP）——為 Troriluzole 教訓後的設計調整。

en.body: Details of the US Phase 2 released: two sites, UCLA and USF, with first patient expected 2026/09, enrolling 20 patients (SCA3), co-led by Drs Susan Perlman and Theresa Zesiewicz; it uses real-world data with a statistical analysis plan (SAP) agreed with FDA in advance — a design change learned from the troriluzole experience.

body: 法說會揭露：產能規劃 2026年300劑→2027年900劑→2028年2,700劑；現金增資每股 NT$68、發行 750萬股；官方市場規模估計台灣 700人（SCA3）、日本 3,000人（SCA3+6）；聘請法規顧問 Kurt Gunter。

en.body: Disclosed on the earnings call: capacity plan of 300 doses in 2026 → 900 in 2027 → 2,700 in 2028; cash capital increase at NT$68 per share, 7.5m shares issued; official market size estimates of 700 patients in Taiwan (SCA3) and 3,000 in Japan (SCA3+6); regulatory adviser Kurt Gunter engaged.

body: Biohaven 的 Troriluzole 遭 FDA 退件（CRL，2025/11）；後續宣布 R&D 削減 60%、並要求與 FDA 正式會談爭取後路（2026/02）。
note: → 領先小分子對手停滯，SCA 賽道出現空窗。

en.body: Biohaven’s troriluzole received an FDA Complete Response Letter (CRL, 2025/11); the company then cut R&D spending by 60% and requested a formal FDA meeting to seek a path forward (2026/02).
en.note: → The leading small-molecule rival has stalled, opening a window in the SCA field.

body: Vico 的 ASO VO659（SCA1/SCA3/HD）2026/02/24 進入半年一次給藥 Ph1/2。
note: → 與本社在 SCA3 重疊，但 SCA 尚無明確療效（SCA3 生物標記混合/微弱、SCA1 無；明確正面在 HD）；曾見 radiculitis（神經根發炎，多數恢復中）。仍 Ph1/2a、遠期。

en.body: Vico’s ASO VO659 (SCA1/SCA3/HD) moved to a twice-yearly dosing Ph1/2 on 2026/02/24.
en.note: → Overlaps with us in SCA3, but there is still no clear efficacy in SCA (SCA3 biomarkers mixed/weak, none in SCA1; the clear positive is in HD); radiculitis (nerve-root inflammation, mostly resolving) has been observed. Still Ph1/2a and years away.
